memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert Darcy
memoryArtifacts.description:
«b»Biography«/b»
Robert is thought to have been the grandson of Henry Darcy, a London vintner and mayor of the City in 1337, who held the manor of Great Yeldham, Essex; and the son of Thomas Darcy, a …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Darcy於1391年出生在英國艾可馬爾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas d'Arcy II32歲，母親Alice Elizabeth Tyrell28歲。他於大約1418年與Lady Alice Fitzlangley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1448年9月3日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國艾可馬爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Darcy于1391年出生在英国艾可馬爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas d'Arcy II32岁，母亲Alice Elizabeth Tyrell28岁。他于大约1418年与Lady Alice Fitzlangley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1448年9月3日在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国艾可馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Darcy was born in 1391, in Maldon, Essex, England, his father, Sir Thomas d'Arcy II, was 32 and his mother, Alice Elizabeth Tyrell, was 28. He married Lady Alice Fitzlangley about 1418, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 September 1448, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Maldon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Darcy est né en 1391, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas d'Arcy II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Elizabeth Tyrell, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Fitzlangley environ 1418, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1448, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Darcy 1391 in Maldon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas d'Arcy II 32 und seine Mutter Alice Elizabeth Tyrell 28. Er hat um 1418 in England, United Kingdom Lady Alice Fitzlangley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. September 1448 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Maldon, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Darcy è nato il nel 1391 nel Maldon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas d'Arcy II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alice Elizabeth Tyrell, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Fitzlangley circa 1418, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1448, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Maldon, Essex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Darcy(이)가 1391년 영국 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas d'Arcy II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Elizabeth Tyrell(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1418년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Alice Fitzlangley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1448년 9월 3일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 맬던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Darcy nasceu em 1391, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas d'Arcy II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Elizabeth Tyrell, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Fitzlangley aproximadamente 1418, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1448, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ro.Tolleshunt Major, Essex, England, United: Tolleshunt Major, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Darcy родился в 1391 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas d'Arcy II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Elizabeth Tyrell, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Fitzlangley около 1418 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 сентября 1448 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Darcy nació en 1391, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas d'Arcy II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Elizabeth Tyrell, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Fitzlangley aproximadamente 1418, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1448, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra.
